div1.entryFree:
Sportive, 1) giving or taking pleasure, merry, playful: for s. words, Lucr. 1813. in a s. humour, Err. I, 2, 58. drive thee from the s. court, All's III, 2, 109.
2) amorous, wanton: why should others' false adulterate eyes give salutation to my s. blood? Sonn. 121, 6. I, that am not shaped for s. tricks, R3 I, 1, 14.
